response:
subject: Thank you for your assistance  

body:  

Dear Mr. Ivan Klimkovic,  

Thank you for your helpful and detailed response.  

I wanted to inform you that there may be a misunderstanding regarding the current machine vision setup. The system in question is the FLIR FL3-U3-120S3C-C, and the image sensor used is the Sony IMX172, not the e2V sensor as previously mentioned.  

Please refer to the attached technical data for further details.  

In the FL3-U3-Technical-Reference PDF file, please check page 18 for the detailed datasheet. Additionally, for the quantum efficiency information, please refer to the FL3-U3-EMVA-Imaging PDF file, page 13.  

I will review these files and manuals more carefully and will keep you informed.  

Thank you again for your support.  

Best regards,  
[Your Name]
